prompt: Edit image 1: Use its decorative '@' symbol as a recurring graphical element. Arrange these elements to create a structure resembling the Borromean rings from image 2, forming a diagram. Apply the color scheme from image 3's green palette to the elements and connections.
prompt_refined: Modify image 1 directly: Reconstruct its central decorative '@' symbol into an intricate diagram. This diagram should be composed of multiple, smaller instances of the original decorative '@' symbol (as seen in image 1) arranged to form the distinct interlocking structure of the Borromean rings from image 2. Apply the entire green color palette from image 3 to color these replicated '@' symbols and the visual connections forming the rings, ensuring a cohesive and visually distinct representation.
objects: original central decorative '@' symbol (should not be present)
